Test Description: Verifies default reset values and masked write-read behavior for DMAC register set across six data patterns; aggregates failures and determines final pass/fail via finish().
Remarks:
- Addresses to exercise are defined in addr_array (92 entries) with corresponding default_value_array, read_mask_array, write_mask_array, and skip_array.
- Registers with read_mask == 0 are treated as not readable and are skipped for reads.
- Registers with write_mask == 0 are treated as not writable and are skipped for writes and subsequent readback checks.
- skip_array[i] == 1 skips both write and read for that address.
- soft_reset_chk() is defined but commented out in test_case(), hence not executed.

2) Call chk_rst_val()

6) Final decision: if (def_fail_cnt > 0 || wr_fail_cnt > 0) then finish(1) else finish(0)

Test Case Name:
Overall final acceptance (from test_case): PASS when (def_fail_cnt == 0 && wr_fail_cnt == 0) leading to finish(0); FAIL otherwise leading to finish(1).
- chk_rst_val(): For each i where read_mask_array[i] != 0: condition (read_reg(addr_array[i]) == default_value_array[i]) is a PASS for that address; else def_fail_cnt++ and prints \RST : Failed Default value mismatch ...\".

Index: - chk_rd_wr(): For each pattern j and each i where skip_array[i] == 0 and write_mask_array[i] != 0 and read_mask_array[i] != 0: compute exp_val = ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | ((write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff) & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); PASS when (read_reg(addr_array[i]) == exp_val); else wr_fail_cnt++ and prints \"Read_write : Failed : Write Read mismatch ...\"."
